title: ReinforcementDensity
description: ReinforcementDensity: The reinforcement density of an element and its material.

Density.description: The mass of reinforcement per unit volume of the element that owns this fragment. Property has a quantity of type Density meassured in [kg/m³].

_t.description: Optional Type discirminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
